---
title: "Community Guidelines"
subtitle: "How we behave in First Break AI"
description: "Community Guidelines for First Break AI — the same rules pinned in our Discord #rules channel. Covers age, safety, respect, on-topic discussion, no piracy, no harmful AI use, privacy, and moderation."
date-meta: "2026-05-15"
---

*Last updated: 15 May 2026*

These rules apply to the website, office hours, and anywhere else First Break AI operates as a community.

By joining, you agree to follow these rules. They sit alongside our [Terms of Use](terms.qmd) and [Privacy Policy](privacy.qmd).

## 1. Age & safety

This community is **recommended for learners aged 16+**.

If you are **under 18**, join only with parent or guardian permission.

Do not share personal information such as phone number, address, school or college ID, government ID, private photos, exact location, passwords, API keys, or family details.

No NSFW content, sexual content, grooming behaviour, harassment, or unsafe DMs. Suspicious behaviour toward minors will lead to an immediate ban.

## 2. Be respectful

No insults, bullying, hate speech, caste/religion/gender-based abuse, racism, sexism, or mocking beginners.

Disagree with ideas, not people.

## 3. Help people learn

Beginners are welcome.

Ask clear questions. Share what you tried, the error you got, and any relevant screenshots or logs.

Do not shame basic questions.

## 4. Stay on topic

Keep discussions related to AI, ML, LLMs, training, inference, Hugging Face, datasets, agents, tools, research, and projects.

Avoid political fights, religious debates, random spam, and unrelated content.

## 5. No spam or aggressive self-promotion

Do not drop links without context.

No affiliate spam, referral spam, repeated promotion, unrelated job posts, or mass advertising.

Ask a mod before promoting a course, product, community, event, or paid service.

## 6. No piracy or illegal content

Do not share pirated courses, cracked software, leaked API keys, stolen datasets, malware, credential dumps, or illegal material.

Do not ask for help bypassing licences, paywalls, exams, platform limits, or security systems.

## 7. No harmful AI use

Do not ask for help with scams, phishing, malware, impersonation, deepfake abuse, harassment, credential theft, or bypassing safety systems.

This server is for **learning AI engineering responsibly**.

## 8. Respect privacy

Do not share private DMs, screenshots, personal details, or someone else's work without permission.

Do not cold-DM members for sales, hiring, mentoring, dating, or promotion.

## 9. Use the right channels

Post in the correct channel so the server stays useful.

Use `#introductions`, `#help-and-questions`, `#debugging`, `#resources`, and `#project-showcase` properly.

## 10. Mods have final say

Mods may remove posts, warn, mute, or ban users to protect the community.

Repeated rule-breaking will lead to removal.

---

## Our goal

Learn deeply. Build real projects. Show your work. Help others get better.

If you see a violation, ping a mod or email `contact@bubblspace.com`.
